pulse.summary: Users flagged friction across the top themes this week. Investigate the most-cited issues and prioritise fixes for the next sprint.
pulse.recommendation: Investigate and patch the user friendly interface issues (32 reviews) before next release.

feedback.text: nice app & transection very fast and no issues this is a good app for trading
Groww is one of the worst trading apps right now. Its brokerage and other charges are very high, which can significantly reduce your profits.

So far it is a good experience. I had an issue with the banking details which was solved within a day by the customer service team. so great work! Still giving 4 stars because there is always room for improvement! 😊😉
very good application to invest and learn. Note : Need more indicator to analyse.

bullets: Stock delivery trades on Groww incur Rs 20 or 0.1% (whichever is lower) per executed order. [1]
Intraday and F&O trades are charged Rs 20 per executed order, plus statutory levies. [3]
Mutual funds direct plans on Groww have zero commission and no transaction fees. [2]
Exit load is a mutual-fund-house charge for redeeming units inside the lock-in window — Groww does not earn this. [2]
Demat AMC for stock investors is billed annually after the first year, separate from per-trade brokerage. [3]
GST, SEBI turnover fee, STT and stamp duty are statutory levies passed through unchanged on every trade. [3]

decision.move: Double-down — extract the UX patterns users love and apply across new screens
decision.why: "User Friendly Interface" emerged this week (n=32, avg ★3.2). First time it's appeared in the top themes.
decision.impact: Addresses ~6% of weekly review volume (32 reviews) — projected NPS impact +2.2
